new.name: CVE-2025-0133
new.description: Scope-aware bug bounty pipeline for CVE-2025-0133 (Palo Alto PAN-OS GlobalProtect reflected XSS). Shodan → H1/BC scope match → safe canary validation → report drafts.

new.name: page_inject
new.description: CVE-2026-31431-killed page-cache exploit — code exec into containers sharing the same image layer

new.name: XSS-HUNTER
new.description: Scan reflected XSS with an automated bug bounty workflow that chains tools from subdomain discovery to confirmed PoC findings

update.name: CVE-2026-41940-Exploit-PoC
update.description: Test authentication bypass vulnerabilities in cPanel and WHM using this proof of concept exploit tool written in Go.

update.name: CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail
update.description: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.

update.name: CVE-2020-3580
update.description: Cisco ASA XSS CVE-2020-3580

update.name: CVE-2026-2991
update.description: Explore a PoC for CVE-2026-2991, an auth bypass in KiviCare 4.1.2 and earlier via the patient social-login REST endpoint

update.name: CVE-2026-31802
update.description: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.

update.name: cve-2025-66398
update.description: Demonstrate exploitation of Signal K Server CVE-2025-66398 allowing unauthenticated attackers to inject backdoor and enable remote code execution.

update.name: CVE-2026-2472-Vertex-AI-SDK-Google-Cloud
update.description: Expose and detail an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability in the Google Cloud Vertex AI Python SDK affecting versions 1.98.0 to 1.130.9.

update.name: CVE-2026-25643
update.description: Exploit Frigate NVR ≤0.16.3 to execute commands remotely by abusing a configuration flaw without needing shell access or output capture.

update.name: CVE-2025-69985
update.description: Exploit CVE-2025-69985 to bypass authentication and execute remote commands on FUXA versions ≤ 1.2.8 via the /api/runscript endpoint.

update.name: Estudo-de-Caso-CVE-2026-31431-CopyFail
update.description: 🔐 Estudo de caso completo do CVE-2026-31431 (CopyFail) — vulnerabilidade crítica de escalada de privilégio no kernel Linux. Inclui análise técnica, scripts de verificação, hardening e playbook de resposta a incidentes. Fins educacionais.

update.name: CVE-2026-2441-PoC
update.description: Demonstrate a proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-2441, a high-risk Chrome use-after-free vulnerability in the Blink CSS engine.

update.name: CVE-2026-20841
update.description: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad via markdown links exploiting unsecured URL protocols.

update.name: CVE-2026-20841-PoC
update.description: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad versions below 11.2510 using the CVE-2026-20841 proof of concept.

update.name: CVE-2025-2304
update.description: 🛠️ Exploit CVE-2025-2304 in Camaleon CMS easily with this Python script for privilege escalation, tested on version 2.9.0.

update.name: CVE-2025-5419
update.description: 🛡️ Analyze CVE-2025-5419 to exploit an uninitialized read vulnerability in V8 for arbitrary read/write access within the sandbox environment.

update.name: Terrminus-CVE-2026-2406
update.description: 🔍 Analyze and detect CVE-2026-2406 vulnerabilities in Telnet to enhance security and prevent unauthorized access with this professional research engine.

update.name: CVE-2026-24061
update.description: 🚨 Exploit CVE-2026-24061, a critical remote authentication bypass in GNU inetutils-telnetd, for instant root shell access without authentication.

update.name: CVE-2025-59287
update.description: 🔍 Analyze WSUS deserialization behavior to enhance security, generate reports, and identify configuration weaknesses in your infrastructure.

update.name: CVE-2025-68921
update.description: 🔍 Identify and understand the local privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2025-68921) in Nahimic audio software, impacting many gaming laptops.

update.name: CVE-2025-14847
update.description: 🛠 Exploit the CVE-2025-14847 vulnerability in MongoDB to disclose sensitive heap memory using a Python script that analyzes responses for new leaked data.

update.name: CVE-2026-0073-Android-ADBD-bypass-POC
update.description: CVE-2026-0073 — Android ADB daemon (adbd) TLS authentication bypass via EVP_PKEY_cmp type confusion. Gain unauthorized shell access over WiFi using EC/Ed25519 key mismatch. PoC exploit for Android 14+.

update.name: CVE-2026-41940
update.description: PoC for CVE-2026-41940: WHM/cPanel authentication bypass chain (Python 2.7). For authorized security research and testing only.

update.name: cpanel-sessionscribe
update.description: Detection, mitigation, and reverse-engineering tooling for CVE-2026-41940 (SessionScribe): the cPanel/WHM unauthenticated session-forgery vulnerability disclosed 2026-04-28. Defense-in-depth active mitigation shim, ModSec rule pack, remote probe, on-host IOC scanner, and per-tier RE snapshot collector. GPL v2.

update.description: CVE-2026-41940 Auto Root Login

update.description: Bulk scanner and mass exploitation tool for CVE-2026-41940 on cPanel/WHM, built for automated target validation and high-speed multi-threaded execution.
